reviews.subtitle: Testimonials
reviews.title: What Our Customers Say
reviews.review0Text: Brilliant service! Had my screen replaced in under an hour. Prices are very fair and the staff are super friendly.
reviews.review1Text: Bought a refurbished iPhone here — works like new. They even threw in a free case. Highly recommend!
reviews.review2Text: Best phone shop in town. Quick unlocking service and great advice on which phone to buy. Five stars!

contact.subtitle: Get In Touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question or need a quick quote? Reach out — we're always happy to help.

faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about our mobile shop.
faq.repairA: We repair all major smartphone brands: screen replacements, battery swaps, charging port fixes, water damage recovery, camera and speaker issues. Just bring your device in — we'll give you a free quote.
faq.warrantyQ: Do you offer a warranty on repairs?
faq.warrantyA: Yes, every repair comes with a warranty. The duration depends on the type of repair — typically 3 to 12 months.
faq.buyUsedQ: Can I buy used phones from you?
faq.buyUsedA: Absolutely! We offer tested and refurbished smartphones at fair prices. Every device is thoroughly inspected and comes with a warranty.
faq.sellDeviceQ: How can I sell my old phone?
faq.sellDeviceA: Simply bring your device in or fill out our sell form. We'll assess its value and make you a fair offer — cash on the spot.
faq.repairTimeQ: How long does a repair take?
faq.repairTimeA: Most repairs like screen or battery replacements take 30–60 minutes. For more complex issues, we'll let you know the estimated time upfront.
faq.accessoriesA: Cases, tempered glass, charging cables, earphones, power banks and more — for all popular smartphone models.
faq.simUnlockQ: Do you offer SIM cards and phone unlocking?
faq.simUnlockA: Yes, we sell prepaid SIM cards from various providers and offer professional phone unlocking services.
faq.paymentQ: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentA: We accept cash, debit cards and contactless payments. For larger amounts, instalment plans may be available — just ask.
faq.appointmentA: No, you can walk in anytime during our opening hours. For time-sensitive repairs, we recommend calling ahead.
faq.brandsQ: Which brands do you repair and sell?
faq.brandsA: We work with all major brands: Apple, Samsung, Huawei, Xiaomi, OnePlus, Google Pixel and many more.
faq.moreQuestions: Still have questions? Message us directly!

sell.step2Desc: We'll respond with a fair price offer.
sell.step3Desc: Bring your device in and get paid instantly.
